title: Intro to Ophthalmology: Clinical Skills Workshop
summary: A hands-on workshop covering basic ophthalmic clinical skills.
content: Join us for a practical session covering slit-lamp, fundoscopy and basic eye examination techniques. Open to all students.

title: Career Panel: Training Pathways
summary: Panel discussion with trainees and consultants about ophthalmology training.
content: Hear from current ophthalmology trainees and consultants about their training pathway, applications, and tips for getting experience.
